details: Package winutils-fetch@2.0.0 is a trojanized combosquat impersonating a Windows-utilities naming pattern. Its index.js exports a harmless figlet ASCII-art function (decoy). The real payload is in the postinstall hook and dependency chain: on install, the script runs "npm i win-utils-helper" which pulls in a known-malware package. The package also declares a self-dependency (winutils-fetch@^1.0.0) as a confusion marker. Installing this package will automatically download and install the win-utils-helper malware via the npm lifecycle.
